transcript: Speaker A: दीदी और कितना सामान है अंदर? [Sister, how much more luggage is inside?] Speaker B: I think there are 3 more bags. Speaker A: समझा नहीं दीदी, हिंदी में बोलिए ना। [Didn't understand sister, please speak in Hindi.] Speaker B: मैंने बोला कि 3 और बैग्स होंगे शायद अंदर। [I said there might be 3 more bags inside.] Speaker A: ओके ओके, मुझे भी अच्छी इंग्लिश सीखनी है, कैसे सीखूं? [Okay okay, I also want to learn good English, how do I learn?] Speaker B: अरे ये तो बहुत आसान है, बस MySivi ऐप इंस्टॉल करो। [Oh, that's very easy, just install the MySivi app.] Speaker A: MySivi ऐप, वो क्या है? [MySivi app, what is that?] Speaker B: इस ऐप में एक AI टीचर है, जो बिना किसी जजमेंट के इंग्लिश सिखाती है। गलतियां करोगे तो ये तुरंत करेक्ट भी कर देती है। [In this app, there is an AI teacher who teaches English without any judgment. If you make mistakes, she corrects them immediately.] Speaker A: अच्छा, पर ये ऐप तो महंगा होगा ना? [Okay, but this app must be expensive, right?] Speaker B: बिल्कुल नहीं, सिर्फ ₹1 में ही शुरू कर सकते हो। रोज़ सिर्फ 15 मिनट प्रैक्टिस करो और कुछ ही दिनों में तुम्हारी इंग्लिश अच्छी हो जाएगी। [Not at all, you can start for just ₹1. Practice for just 15 minutes daily and in a few days, your English will get better.] Speaker A: वाह, फिर शुरू कैसे करूं? [Wow, then how do I start?] Speaker B: बस इंस्टॉल बटन पे क्लिक करो, MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो और अपनी इंग्लिश जर्नी शुरू करो। [Just click on the install button, download the MySivi app, and start your English journey.]
on_screen_text: AUR [AND] I THINK THERE ARE 3 MORE SAMJHA NAHI [DIDN'T UNDERSTAND] HINDI MEIN BOLIYE [SPEAK IN HINDI] MAINE BOLA [I SAID] 3 AUR [3 MORE] SHAYAD ANDAR [PROBABLY INSIDE] MUJHE [ME] ENGLISH SEEKHNI [WANT TO LEARN ENGLISH] KAISE SEEKHUN [HOW DO I LEARN] ARRE YE TOH [OH THIS IS] BAHUT [VERY] MySivi BAS MYSIVI [JUST MYSIVI] INSTALL KARO [INSTALL IT] WOH KYA [WHAT IS THAT] ISS APP MEIN [IN THIS APP] AI TEACHER BINA KISI [WITHOUT ANY] JUDGEMENT ENGLISH GALTIYAN KAROGE [IF YOU MAKE MISTAKES] TURANT [IMMEDIATELY] CORRECT DETI HAI [DOES IT] PAR YE APP [BUT THIS APP] MAHANGA [EXPENSIVE] HOGA NA [MUST BE, RIGHT] BILKUL NAHI [NOT AT ALL] SIRF 1 [ONLY 1] RUPEE MEIN [IN RUPEE] ROZ [DAILY] 15 PRACTICE KARO [DO] KUCH HI [IN JUST A FEW] DINON MEIN [DAYS] ENGLISH ACHHI HO JAYEGI [WILL BECOME GOOD] PHIR SHURU [THEN START] KAISE KARUN [HOW DO I DO IT] MySivi AI English Speaking... Install Cancel MYSIVI DOWNLOAD ENGLISH JOURNEY
summary: A man at a train station asks a woman how to improve his English. She recommends the MySivi app, highlighting its non-judgmental AI teacher that corrects mistakes instantly and its low cost of 1 rupee for a 3-day trial.
